youtube_items.title: [YT] IMF warns of global recession, inflation over 6% if strait stays closed | ABC NEWS - YouTube
youtube_items.summary: The International Monetary Fund has warned of a potential global recession due to the economic shocks from the war in the Middle East. The IMF notes US and Israeli strikes on Iran, the closing of the Strait of Hormuz, and strikes on energy infrastructure in Gulf countries have rocked global markets and will likely push growth down from 2025. The body's chief economist says the reopening of the strait can avoid the worst outcomes. But says there are three possible scenarios the IMF must consider should talks fail. Our report presents three scenarios. Our reference forecast assumes a short-lived conflict and a moderate 19% rise in energy prices in 2026. Still, some damage will not be avoided. youtube_items.summary: Good to see you. The economy has been holding steady and the latest numbers show that jobs have been growing slowly with hospitality and health care seeing increases but manufacturing seeing fewer jobs. Unemployment has been holding steady at 4.2%. Is a recession still a concern? And will the Fed cut rate cuts this summer come as expected? Alexander Salter watches these numbers very closely. raw_items.title: Spirit Airlines Cancels All Flights, Stranding Passengers
raw_items.summary: The budget carrier abruptly canceled flights early on Saturday, leaving passengers to rush to make other plans. “Even if they go back into business, never again,” one traveler said.
